title: Neo-Precisionism with Grant Yun
author: theline1
excerpt: Grant Yun is a crypto artist known for blending sweet pastel palette landscapes with nostalgic American vibes, often informed by his medical precision and appreciation for rural and suburban settings. His works emphasize simplicity. A sense of calm and reflection wash over you. Yun's art has resonated widely in the cryptoart space. tl:dr David Hockney wif tokens.
content:
The Artist: Grant Yun

Grant Yun is a crypto artist known for blending sweet pastel palette landscapes with nostalgic American vibes, often informed by his medical precision and appreciation for rural and suburban settings. His works emphasize simplicity. A sense of calm and reflection wash over you. Yun's art has resonated widely in the cryptoart space. tl:dr David Hockney wif tokens.

The Collection: Life In Japan

We get a glimpse into what it might be like to live in Japan. The most simplest of daily activities are illustrated in Biking Home and Midnight Snack Run. Two simple activities, that are given context through the locations of The Coast and School & Apartments. Is this the kind of life Yun remembers from his early student years? There are 374 editions in the Life in Japan. From left to right Midnight Snack Run (1/25), The Coast (1/10), School & Apartments (1/329), Biking Home (1/1).

A Specific Artwork: Somewhere in San Francisco

1/1 Yun's don't come along all that often. Somewhere in San Francisco listed yesterday for 21 Eth. It is one of 58 1 of 1s Yun minted on SuperRare and was minted on April 17th 2021. We are seeing his interpretation an urban America at is zenith.

Grant Yun | Line 301 Exit via The Line Gift Shop
